_note: The three angles the engine fans proposals across for this test cargo. The judge never sees which angle produced which proposal (sealed per-round mapping).

approaches.title: Economia — quietude e um só detalhe
approaches.hint: Cut everything optional. Stillness carries the menace; prefer one strong element over three good ones; long holds, minimal cuts, silence as a weapon. Some things happen off-screen and are told by light and sound.

approaches.title: Homage — gramática clássica do género
approaches.hint: Lean on the genre's proven grammar: dramatic low angles, speed lines, held impact frames, background abstracting into pure energy at the peak, triumphant hero hold. Familiar shapes executed cleanly — catharsis over menace.

approaches.title: Fisicalidade — peso e consequência
approaches.hint: Ground everything in weight and cost: feet plant, cloth tears, breath is audible, debris obeys mass, sound arrives late like real distance. No impact frames — the transformation reads as physical labor, not magic.
